stories.headline: Iran ceasefire deadline nears EUR/USD added around 0.2% on Monday, finding a small lift off overnight lows close to 1.1730 to trade near 1.1790 during the European session.
stories.summary: Iran's ceasefire deadline is nearing, with a two-week truce announced by the US after threats of severe action. The truce was declared hours before the deadline for Tehran to reach an agreement with the US. Despite the fragile nature of the truce, financial markets are expected to trade with more confidence as long as it remains in place. The EUR/USD exchange rate added around 0.2% on Monday, trading near 1.1790 during the European session. Geopolitical tensions weighed on sentiment, with a US delegation set to travel to Pakistan and an Israeli airstrike killing at least three people in Gaza. Oil prices rose after Iran re-closed the Strait of Hormuz, but equity and Treasury futures pared their losses through the session. The US released relevant economic figures, which may influence market sentiment. The truce's uncertainty and upcoming peace talks will be closely watched.

stories.headline: Israeli Soldier in Lebanon Sledgehammered a Statue of Jesus The military is investigating the soldier. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu expressed regret for any hurt caused to “believers in Lebanon and around the world.
stories.summary: An Israeli soldier was photographed striking a Catholic statue of Jesus with a sledgehammer in southern Lebanon. The Israeli military has confirmed the authenticity of the photo and is conducting a criminal investigation. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu expressed regret for any hurt caused to believers in Lebanon and around the world, stating he was "stunned and saddened" by the incident. Netanyahu said the soldier will be punished, and the military will take action against those responsible. The incident has sparked an investigation, with the Israel Defense Forces committed to addressing the matter. The soldier's actions have been widely condemned, and the Israeli government has apologized for any offense caused to Christians in Lebanon and globally. The investigation is ongoing, and further action is expected to be taken against the soldier involved.

stories.headline: North Korea’s evolving diplomatic logic Kim is consolidating ties with a small cluster of partners – Moscow matters, but China offers a particular prize.
stories.summary: North Korea is strengthening diplomatic ties with China and Russia, deepening its relationships with these key partners. Recent weeks have seen a surge in diplomatic efforts, with growing trade ties and new border infrastructure indicating Beijing's efforts to draw Pyongyang back into its orbit. North Korean leader Kim Jong Il has expressed support for China's "One China" principle, and the country's participation in Moscow's Victory Day parade alongside Chinese troops reflects its strengthening ties with Russia. This cooperation is expected to boost North Korea's economy, support defense modernization, and mitigate the effects of sanctions. The widening diplomatic portfolio will also increase trade exports and technology imports, benefiting Pyongyang. The coordination between North Korea, China, and Russia has significant implications, particularly in the face of Western opposition.

stories.headline: Nigerian wins global prize for trying to save bats in a country that shuns them A Nigerian scientist's "personal experience" with a wildfire, its threat to endangered bats she discovered just days before, and her campaign to protect them, h
stories.summary: A Nigerian scientist has won the global Goldman Environmental Prize for her efforts to protect endangered bats. The scientist had a personal experience with a wildfire that threatened a bat colony she discovered just days before. Despite bats being shunned in Nigeria, she launched a campaign to protect them. Her work led to the recognition, awarding her the prestigious prize. The Goldman Environmental Prize is a global award that honors individuals who have made significant contributions to environmental protection. The scientist's dedication to saving the bats, despite the challenges and negative perception of bats in her country, has earned her international recognition and acclaim. Her efforts highlight the importance of conservation and protecting endangered species, even in the face of adversity. The prize acknowledges her tireless work and commitment to environmental conservation.

stories.headline: Saint Slayer: Spear of Sacrilege slashes onto PC and consoles today!!
stories.summary: Saint Slayer: Spear of Sacrilege has been released on PC and consoles. The game is a Castlevania-inspired hack n' slash action title with 21 stages filled with horror and atmosphere. It features 7 challenging boss battles, hidden secrets, deadly traps, and surprises. The game has multiple endings and allows players to befriend animal familiars, unlock abilities and power-ups, and make choices that impact the game world. A 8-bit chiptune soundtrack accompanies the gameplay. Players can find and unlock various upgrades and bonuses, and the game's difficulty is intensified by seven intense boss fights. The game is available on multiple platforms, including consoles, PC, and mobile devices, offering a range of gameplay options for players.

stories.headline: Amazon has officially removed this Fire Stick capability forever
stories.summary: Amazon has removed a key capability from its Fire Stick devices, although the specific capability has not been disclosed. This change comes as the company launches its newest Fire TV Stick, the slimmest ever, with improved features such as faster browsing and enhanced connectivity. Additionally, Amazon has announced that future Fire TV Stick devices will no longer run on Android, instead using Vega OS. The removal of the capability and the shift to Vega OS may be related to Amazon's new requirement for users to have an Amazon account to use the device. This change is part of Amazon's efforts to streamline its services and improve user experience, with the company also introducing new devices and features, such as the Fire TV Stick HD, which boasts a slim design and improved performance.

stories.headline: Heroes of the Storm Live Patch Notes - April 20, 2026
stories.summary: A new patch for Heroes of the Storm was released on April 20, 2026, introducing several updates. The patch includes a new mount, updates to existing maps, and a major rework of the hero Arthas. Additionally, balance changes have been implemented to adjust the gameplay experience. This patch follows previous updates, including changes to completion requirements on February 19, 2026, and a summary of patch notes on March 18, 2026. Earlier updates, such as the September 2, 2025, patch, also introduced significant changes, including armor grants and slowdown effects for enemy heroes attacking allied heroes near structures. The latest patch aims to continue refining the game's balance and overall player experience. The updates are part of Blizzard's ongoing efforts to maintain and improve Heroes of the Storm.

stories.headline: Medieval Idler & Builder Tidehaven: Ale & Trade Now on Steam
stories.summary: Tidehaven: Ale & Trade is now available on Steam, offering a medieval sim experience with idle play mechanics. Players can build and automate their tavern into a lively town, customizing it with various decorations. The game features both full screen and compact modes, allowing for play in a small pop-up window or on a second screen. This enables players to multitask, such as working or watching series, while still playing the game. Tidehaven: Ale & Trade combines active management with passive progression, providing a unique gaming experience. The game's update includes a detailed cross-section view, enhancing the player's experience. With its cozy medieval setting and smart idle mechanics, Tidehaven: Ale & Trade offers a relaxing and engaging gameplay experience. Players can build, decorate, and automate their medieval tavern, turning it into a thriving town.

stories.headline: Manchester United eye summer move for Real Madrid midfield mainstay
stories.summary: Manchester United are reportedly eyeing a summer move for Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni, who could replace Casemiro. Tchouameni joined Real Madrid in 2022, filling the void left by Casemiro's departure to Manchester United. With Casemiro potentially leaving United, the club is preparing for a major midfield rebuild and is targeting at least two midfielders. Tchouameni, 23, has two years left on his contract, and Real Madrid may be willing to listen to offers, especially if they pursue Manchester City's Rodri. The La Liga club may also need to raise transfer funds, and Eduardo Camavinga is another player they are open to selling. Manchester United's interest in Tchouameni is part of their summer plans, which involve a significant overhaul of their midfield. The Daily Telegraph reports that United are tracking Tchouameni's situation ahead of a potential summer move.

stories.headline: Powerhouses KPC to battle KCB in all-Kenyan African Championships semis
stories.summary: Kenya Pipeline Company (KPC) and Kenya Commercial Bank (KCB) will face off in the semi-finals of the African Women's Volleyball Club Championship. Both teams secured their spots in the last four after winning their respective quarter-final matches in Cairo, Egypt. This sets up an all-Kenyan affair in the first semi-final. KPC had a strong start to the 2026 CAVB Women's African Volleyball Club Championship, while KCB recently earned a spot in the 2025 Kenya Cup finals by defeating Kenya Prisons 3-2 in a semi-final clash. The two powerhouses will now compete against each other for a spot in the championship final. The match is part of the ongoing Africa Women's Volleyball Club Championship in Cairo, Egypt.

stories.headline: bet365 Bonus Code: Get $200 in Bonus Bets for the Hawks vs Knicks NBA Playoff Game
stories.summary: New users of bet365 can receive $200 in bonus bets for the Hawks vs Knicks NBA playoff game by using the bet365 bonus code. To qualify, users must place a $10 wager, and they will receive the bonus bets regardless of the outcome. The offer is available for new bettors and varies by state. By registering and using the promo code, users can bet $10 on the Knicks-Hawks game or any other game and receive the $200 bonus. This promotion is part of the 2026 NBA Playoffs, and new players can activate the offer to enhance their game-day experience. The bonus code provides an opportunity for new users to capitalize on the pivotal playoff game and receive a significant bonus.

stories.headline: Cletus Nombil shines with Man of the Match display in FC Zlin win
stories.summary: Cletus Nombil, a 25-year-old Ghanaian midfielder, delivered a Man of the Match performance in FC Zlín's 3-2 win over FK Teplice in the Czech First League. He scored a goal and had 51 touches, completing 36 passes, including 22 into the final third. Nombil also made 9 ball recoveries, 2 interceptions, and won 3 out of 4 tackles. His impressive display earned him a 7.9 rating, the highest in the league fixture. This outing follows his goal in FC Zlín's 3-1 away win against Teplice in the season's opening round. Nombil's form has been crucial for FC Zlín, who have been in mixed form, winning only 1 of their last 5 matches, scoring 6 goals and conceding 9. His performance has highlighted his growing importance in FC Zlín's midfield.

stories.headline: At least 21 killed as bus crashes into Kashmir gorge The overcrowded bus skidded as it navigated a sharp curve in the mountainous region.
stories.summary: At least 21 people have been killed and over 40 injured in a bus accident in Indian-controlled Kashmir. The overcrowded bus skidded off the road and rolled down a steep, rocky slope into a gorge near Kanote village in Jammu and Kashmir's Udhampur district. The accident occurred as the bus navigated a sharp curve in the mountainous region. Officials reported that the bus lost control and plunged into the gorge, resulting in one of the deadliest road accidents in the area. Rescue efforts were undertaken, with the injured being taken to nearby hospitals for treatment. The exact cause of the accident is yet to be determined, but overcrowding and the challenging terrain are believed to be contributing factors.

stories.headline: Supreme Court allows Bombay HC to proceed with contempt case against lawyer for allegations against Justice Revati Mohite Dere The lawyer had alleged that Justice Dere was disqualified from hearing a plea seeking a fresh probe into Disha Salian’s death as her sister was linked to the NC
stories.summary: The Supreme Court has allowed the Bombay High Court to proceed with a contempt case against advocate Nilesh C. Ojha for allegations made against Justice Revati Mohite Dere. Ojha had alleged that Justice Dere was disqualified from hearing a plea seeking a fresh probe into Disha Salian's death due to her sister's links to the NCP. The contempt case stems from statements made by Ojha during a press conference on April 1, 2025, related to a petition filed by Satish Salian, Disha Salian's father. The Bombay High Court had initiated suo motu contempt proceedings against Ojha for allegedly making defamatory remarks against Justice Dere. The Supreme Court upheld the Bombay High Court's decision, permitting the contempt case to proceed. The case relates to the 2020 death of Disha Salian, with her father seeking a fresh investigation.

stories.headline: Rahul Gandhi citizenship case: Allahabad HC criticises Deputy Solicitor General, petitioner for poor legal assistance The Court had on April 17 found a prima facie case against Gandhi and granted liberty to the State to refer the matter to the Central government.
stories.summary: The Allahabad High Court criticized the Deputy Solicitor General and the petitioner for poor legal assistance in the Rahul Gandhi citizenship case. On April 17, the court found a prima facie case against Gandhi and granted the state liberty to refer the matter to the central government. However, it later withheld the order. The court expressed dissatisfaction with the government advocates and Deputy Solicitor General for not presenting the correct legal position on whether a notice should be issued to Gandhi before passing an order. The Deputy Solicitor General conceded that the petitioner's social media posts cannot be defended. The court halted the operation of its earlier direction to register an FIR against Gandhi, citing lack of proper assistance from various parties during the hearing. The case is ongoing, with the court seeking proper legal assistance to proceed.

stories.headline: Mere Entry In Municipality Property Register Not Proof Of Title : Supreme Court Rejects MCD's Claim The Supreme Court has observed that mere entry in the property records maintained by a municipal authority cannot, by itself, establish ownership over land, rei
stories.summary: The Supreme Court has ruled that a mere entry in a municipality's property register does not constitute proof of title over land. A bench of Justice Vikram Nath and Justice Sandeep Mehta set aside the Delhi Municipal Corporation's (MCD) claim, stating that such an entry cannot, by itself, establish ownership. The court emphasized that the 1988 civil court findings, which were never further challenged, take precedence. This ruling is consistent with the court's previous decisions, which held that property registration alone does not establish legal ownership and that buyers must verify complete payment, possession, and original title documents. The court has consistently warned that registered transactions can be invalidated due to fraud, incomplete payment, or other issues, and that they do not convey title or create interest in immovable property.

stories.headline: The Geopolitics of Infrastructure Bertrand Badré & Saurabh Mishra see the financing, construction, and control of strategic assets as a growing source of global power.
stories.summary: Bertrand Badré and Saurabh Mishra argue that the financing, construction, and control of strategic infrastructure assets are becoming a key source of global power. Historically, global power was defined by military alliances, naval presence, and economic influence. However, the era is shifting towards one where control over critical infrastructure, such as sustainable and intelligent platforms, determines power. Infrastructure investment is currently booming, with a focus on turning infrastructure from a climate risk into a platform for sustainable prosperity. Badré, CEO of BlueOrange Capital, an investment fund focused on Sustainable Development Goals, and Mishra see this shift as an opportunity for countries and companies to demonstrate leadership in creating shared, intelligent infrastructure platforms that promote sustainable growth. This new paradigm is expected to redefine global power dynamics.

stories.headline: China’s pharma dominance is just beginning As with anything at the intersection of the US and China, geopolitics is likely to come into play.
stories.summary: China has emerged as the world's second-largest source of new drug launches, capturing 18% of the global share of New Molecular Entities (NMEs) by early 2026. This growth is a result of R&D investments made five to ten years prior. The country's dominance in the pharmaceutical industry also extends to the supply of raw materials, with China providing most critical drug ingredients to the US. This dependency is growing, presenting a significant supply-chain vulnerability for the US. A US commission has urged Congress to require pharmaceutical firms to report supply chain origins and encourage diversification. As tensions between the US and China continue, there are concerns that Beijing may use its pharmaceutical supply chains as a geopolitical tool, highlighting the need for the US to reduce its reliance on Chinese imports. China's biopharma advantage is expected to persist despite rising geopolitical friction.

stories.headline: Trump’s Insane Escalation Is About to Unleash a Global Collapse The Point of No Return
stories.summary: President Donald Trump's options for dealing with Iran have become limited after the failure of US-Iran peace talks. Trump has threatened to wipe out Iran, sparking concern among former allies and advisers about his mental state. The Iranian regime's resistance has frustrated Trump, who had expected a collapse rather than economic disruption. In response, Trump has abandoned rhetorical restraint, issuing a warning of escalation that sent global stocks down and oil prices up. The threat has dashed hopes of a quick exit from the conflict, and analysts warn that further escalation could have sustained negative effects. Trump's deadline for a deal has passed without an agreement, prompting a bloodthirsty threat from the president. The situation has raised concerns about a potential global collapse, with markets reversing gains as the prospect of a swift resolution fades.

stories.headline: Geopolitics vs Your Portfolio: What this leading wealth expert recommends Sensex rebounds 650 points from low as investors assess crude risks, Hormuz tensions and India’s macro buffers, says Dezerv’s Vaibhav Porwal.
stories.summary: India's Sensex rebounded 650 points from its low as investors assessed crude risks, Hormuz tensions, and the country's macro buffers, according to Dezerv's Vaibhav Porwal. Geopolitical tensions between India and Pakistan have sparked anxiety among investors, with war-like headlines impacting national morale and the markets. The Indian stock market has historically shown resilience in the face of temporary uncertainty, distinguishing between political noise and long-term economic potential. Despite a recent drop of 650 points and the Nifty slipping below 11,500, the market is expected to recover quickly due to domestic consumption, infrastructure development, and corporate earnings. Crude oil prices topping $100 and Middle East tensions have contributed to a ₹3.3 lakh crore market sell-off, but India's macro buffers are seen as a stabilizing factor. The market's ability to "look through" temporary uncertainty is expected to prevail.

stories.headline: Mamata Banerjee: The Bengal test: Can Mamata hold, or will BJP crack the bastion?
stories.summary: West Bengal's 2026 assembly election is unfolding with Mamata Banerjee at the center. The state is preparing for polls, with the contest between Banerjee's Trinamool Congress (TMC) and the rising Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) intensifying. The election is a crucial test for Banerjee, who has ruled the state for over 15 years. The BJP is eyeing her seat of power, hoping to breach the Bengal bastion. Surveys indicate a polarized electorate, with key issues at stake. Banerjee's welfare-driven and confrontational leadership has shaped state politics, but she faces criticism and BJP challenges to retain power. The election will determine whether Bengal votes to retain continuity under Banerjee or shifts towards the BJP's promise of change. The outcome will also impact Banerjee's national influence, as she is known for her strong leadership and emotional appeal built around "maa, mati, manush" (mother, land, people).

stories.headline: Biden and Putin Exchange Blunt Words Amid Rising US-Russia Tensions
stories.summary: US President Joe Biden and Russian President Vladimir Putin have exchanged blunt words amid rising tensions between the two countries. The escalation comes as Moscow and Washington coordinate a previously agreed prisoner exchange. Russia has intensified its military attacks on Ukraine and flown jets over NATO countries, including Estonia, Poland, and Romania. Biden has accused the previous administration of "modern-day appeasement" in its dealings with Putin, risking the trans-Atlantic alliance. The situation has worsened since Putin's meeting with former President Donald Trump, with Russia increasing its aggressive actions. The US and Russia are currently at odds over the Ukraine war, with no signs of de-escalation. The prisoner exchange is one of the few areas where the two countries are still cooperating, despite the overall deterioration in relations. Tensions between the US and Russia continue to rise.

stories.headline: US Senate Passes Landmark Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill in Major Win for Biden
stories.summary: The US Senate passed a landmark bipartisan infrastructure bill, a major win for President Biden. The bill, worth $1.2 trillion, focuses on physical infrastructure such as roads, bridges, railways, water, sewage, broadband, and electric vehicles. On November 28, 2025, 19 Republican Senators joined Democratic Senators in voting to pass the bill, with 30 Republicans voting against it. Earlier, on September 19, 2025, the Senate passed a $550 billion infrastructure bill 69-30, with 19 Republicans supporting it. The bill's passage is a significant step in Biden's economic agenda, following a bipartisan deal reached on June 24. The infrastructure plan had been the subject of debate, with some progressives pushing to use it as leverage for a larger reconciliation bill, while moderates sought a separate vote on the bipartisan bill. The bill's passage marks a significant bipartisan achievement.

stories.headline: European Union Imposes New Sanctions on Belarus Over Human Rights Abuses
stories.summary: The European Union has imposed new sanctions on Belarus over human rights abuses and its support for Russia's war against Ukraine. The 19th package of sanctions, adopted on October 23, 2025, targets the energy, financial, and military industrial sectors. An additional 38 individuals and 3 entities have been sanctioned due to continued human rights abuses. The EU has also extended export bans to firearms, aviation, and space industries in response to Belarus' involvement in Russia's military aggression against Ukraine. The sanctions follow the fraudulent 2020 elections, repression of civil society, and human rights abuses in Belarus. The EU condemns these actions and stands in support of the Belarusian people, imposing further targeted measures to address circumvention concerns and hybrid attacks against the EU. The sanctions aim to hold Belarus accountable for its actions.

stories.headline: Stock markets today: Sensex, Nifty50 close flat in volatile trade Indian benchmark indices, Sensex and Nifty, closed almost unchanged in a volatile session as investors reacted cautiously to mounting geopolitical headwinds and
stories.summary: Indian benchmark indices, Sensex and Nifty, closed almost unchanged in a volatile session due to cautious investor sentiment. The BSE Sensex and NSE Nifty50 swung between gains and losses, with the Sensex trading at 85,106.81, down 31.46 points, and the Nifty hovering near the 25,000 mark. The domestic market reflected subdued sentiment, driven by weak global cues and profit booking. Investors are weighing expectations of potential interest-rate cuts in the US and India, alongside incoming domestic growth signals. The market has been volatile, with the indices extending losses for a third consecutive session ahead of the RBI's monetary policy decision. Geopolitical headwinds, including economic and diplomatic measures against Pakistan, have also impacted investor sentiment. Overall, the Indian stock market has been trading with a negative bias, with investors locking in gains near record territory.

stories.headline: Why is stock market rising today? Sensex jumps 400 points, Nifty above 24,450. 5 key factors explained Indian markets reversed early losses to trade higher, supported by a stronger rupee, continued FII buying and oil prices staying below $100 per barrel. Benchmar
stories.summary: Indian stock markets are rising, with the Sensex gaining over 600 points and the Nifty crossing 24,350. The surge is driven by a combination of factors, including easing geopolitical tensions and falling crude oil prices, which have remained below $100 per barrel. This is beneficial for India's import-heavy economy, as lower oil prices help control inflation and reduce costs for companies. Positive global cues are also supporting the market rise. Additionally, strong institutional buying, including continued FII buying, is contributing to the gains. A stronger rupee is also providing support to the markets. Overall, the combination of these factors has led to a significant rebound in the Indian stock markets, with the Sensex and Nifty trading higher after initial losses. The Nifty is currently above 24,450, with the Sensex gaining over 400 points.

stories.headline: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Tuesday Indian markets closed with modest gains led by SBI and ICICI Bank, as auto and energy sectors recovered; Nifty 50 up 0.05% at 24,364.85, Sensex up 0.03% at 78,5
stories.summary: Indian markets closed with modest gains, led by SBI and ICICI Bank, as auto and energy sectors recovered. The Nifty 50 rose 0.05% to 24,364.85, while the Sensex increased 0.03% to 78,520.30. The India VIX rose 9.21% amid volatility. This comes after a sharp decline on March 23, 2026, due to Iran-Israel tensions and high crude prices. Previously, the market had ended higher on August 4, 2025, driven by gains in IT and metal stocks, and on July 21, 2025, led by strong earnings from HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank. Global markets have been mixed due to geopolitical tensions, and domestic factors, such as earnings season, are expected to shape short-term trends. The market's performance will be closely watched on Tuesday, with various factors influencing stock market action.

stories.headline: Stock Market Live April 21: Stock to buy today: Balrampur Chini Mills Stock Market Today | Share Market Live Updates - Find here all the live updates related to Sensex, Nifty, BSE, NSE, share prices and Indian stock markets for 21
stories.summary: Indian stock markets reopened on April 21, 2026, with live updates available on platforms such as Angel One. The Sensex and Nifty indices are being closely monitored, with investors tracking top gainers and losers. Balrampur Chini Mills is identified as a stock to buy today. The BSE and NSE are providing real-time share prices, with the Nifty 50 Index chart available for tracking. Investors can access technical and fundamental scans, investment themes, and portfolio reports. The Nifty 50 share price chart is also available, showing historical data, including candlestick and periodic charts with various indicators. These updates aim to assist investors in making informed trades and investment decisions on platforms like Angel One and Groww Terminal. The stock market is expected to be active, with investors watching for market news and forecasts.

stories.headline: California Accuses Amazon of Price Fixing in Legal Filing The state claimed the e-commerce giant pressured brands like Levi’s and Hanes to ask competing retailers to raise prices on certain products.
stories.summary: California Attorney General Rob Bonta has filed a request for a preliminary injunction against Amazon, alleging price fixing. The state claims Amazon pressured brands like Levi's and Hanes to ask competing retailers to raise prices on certain products. Newly unsealed documents support allegations that Amazon used its market leverage to get companies like Walmart to increase prices, stifling competition. The lawsuit, filed in 2022, accuses Amazon of violating California's antitrust laws. Amazon denies the allegations, stating it does not engage in price-fixing. The case is ongoing in San Francisco Superior Court, with the attorney general seeking to prevent further alleged anti-competitive practices. The lawsuit aims to protect consumers from inflated prices and promote fair competition in the market.

stories.headline: Coinbase (COIN), Bybit said to be working together on tokenization, custody and distribution of U.S. stocks The talks do not involve any sort of stake acquisition or similar deal to enter the U.S., as was reported elsewhere last month.
stories.summary: Coinbase and Bybit are in discussions to collaborate on the tokenization, custody, and global distribution of U.S. public and pre-IPO stocks. The talks focus on creating a framework for users outside the United States to access these traditional financial assets on-chain. The plan leverages Coinbase's custody infrastructure and Bybit's user base of over 80 million. Bybit's existing xStocks product already offers 24/7 trading on tokenized equities like Apple and Tesla, with $2.87 billion in volume. The discussions are centered on geographic synergy, not a stake sale or U.S. market entry for Bybit. Both firms have declined to comment on the ongoing talks. The potential partnership comes as Bybit prepares to potentially enter the U.S. market later this year, although the current discussions do not involve a U.S. entry deal.

stories.headline: Microsoft To Shift GitHub Copilot Users To Token-Based Billing, Tighten Rate Limits
stories.summary: Microsoft plans to transition GitHub Copilot users to a token-based billing system, replacing the current request-based model. As part of this change, individual account signups for GitHub Copilot will be temporarily suspended. The new token-based billing system will introduce tighter rate limits, affecting Pro and Pro+ plans. Existing users will be subject to the new usage limits, while new signups for these plans will be paused. Microsoft has confirmed the changes, which aim to shift the billing model from single interactions with Copilot to a token-based system. The move is seen as a natural progression for GitHub Copilot, with the company adjusting its pricing and usage limits to better align with its evolving product offerings. The exact details of the token-based billing system and rate limits have been announced by Microsoft.

stories.headline: Dow Jones And U.S. Stock Market Outlook - Back At All-Time Highs, Investors Take A Break US stock benchmarks extended to some fresh new record on Friday, but the euphoria is coming to a stall.
stories.summary: The US stock market reached new record highs on Friday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average and other benchmarks extending their gains. The Nasdaq Composite and Nasdaq-100 also notched new records, rising 1.52% and 1.29% respectively. However, the momentum is slowing down, with investors taking a break after the recent surge. The Dow Jones Industrial Average has been affected by the performance of its constituent companies and macroeconomic factors. The latest gains have pushed the index to new all-time highs, with the Nasdaq Composite and Nasdaq-100 also reaching new records. The market's upward trend is being closely watched, with investors monitoring the latest stock market data and news for signs of continued growth or potential downturn. Live quotes and data are available, providing insight into the current market trends.

stories.headline: ChatGPT down: When will AI chatbot be back up
stories.summary: ChatGPT, a popular AI chatbot, experienced a global outage, leaving users unable to access the platform via the app or website. The outage affected users worldwide, with some receiving an "unusual activity error" or an API error 500 message. Other AI tools and applications, including Claude, were also impacted by outages. OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, provides a suite of AI tools, including Sora, Dall-E, and Data Analyst. The chatbot's conversational format allows it to answer follow-up questions and admit mistakes. After the outage, ChatGPT is now back online, but users reported using alternative AI tools like DeepSeek and Gemini during the downtime. The company has not provided a detailed explanation for the outage, but users can now access ChatGPT again. The incident highlights the reliance on AI chatbots and the need for reliable access to these tools.

stories.headline: Google Unveils New AI Model to Revolutionize Natural Language Processing
stories.summary: Google has unveiled Gemini 3, its latest artificial intelligence model, designed to revolutionize natural language processing. Gemini 3 is the company's most secure model yet, having undergone comprehensive safety evaluations. It features reduced sycophancy, increased resistance to prompt injections, and improved protection against cyberattacks. The model boasts expanded simulated reasoning abilities and improved understanding of text, images, and video. Gemini 3 is Google's second AI model release this year, following similar updates from OpenAI and Anthropic. The new model will enable users to receive better answers and provide developers with new agentic tools. Gemini 3 is part of Google's efforts to keep pace with competitors in the AI landscape, particularly ChatGPT creator OpenAI. The model's enhanced capabilities are expected to improve user experience and provide more accurate results.

stories.headline: Meta Releases Groundbreaking AI-Powered Chatbot with Human-Like Conversations
stories.summary: Meta has launched a standalone AI assistant app powered by its Llama 4 model, offering text, voice, image generation, and web search capabilities. The app features a "Discover" feed with public AI conversations and social sharing, and is available on iOS, Android, and web in the US, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. It introduces experimental full-duplex voice for natural, uninterrupted conversations, allowing users to engage in human-style discussions with the AI. The app adapts to user preferences, remembers context, and learns from interactions to deliver personalized responses. This release marks a significant step towards building a more personal AI, with Meta aiming to provide a smarter and more human-like conversational experience. The app is currently available in select countries, with further expansion expected in the future.

stories.headline: Microsoft Invests Heavily in AI Research to Develop More Advanced Machine Learning Algorithms
stories.summary: Microsoft is heavily investing in AI research to develop advanced machine learning algorithms. The company is prioritizing its AI department, focusing on employee compensation after significant investments in OpenAI technology. Microsoft Research is now centered on machine learning and artificial intelligence, exploring human-computer interaction. The company is also investing in invisible user interface technology, aiming to create intelligent devices that can anticipate user needs. As part of its commitment, Microsoft has pledged $80 billion to AI infrastructure projects. This investment is part of a larger trend, with major tech companies pouring resources into AI development. Educators are already utilizing AI speech generators to create interactive learning materials, demonstrating the technology's potential to transform industries and everyday life. Microsoft's investment underscores the growing importance of AI in the tech world.
